creator: dave@jetcafe.org
text:
I have build failure, using the same OS, with different causes:

[00:00:11] rm -f blib/arch/auto/Gtk2/Gtk2.so
[00:00:11] [ LD blib/arch/auto/Gtk2/Gtk2.so ]
[00:00:11] chmod 755 blib/arch/auto/Gtk2/Gtk2.so
[00:00:11] Creating enum POD...
[00:00:11] Creating stock items POD...
[00:00:11] Can't find 'boot_Gtk2' symbol in blib/arch/auto/Gtk2/Gtk2.so
[00:00:11]  at tools/podifystockitems.pl line 0.
[00:00:11] Compilation failed in require.
[00:00:11] BEGIN failed--compilation aborted.
[00:00:11] Can't find 'boot_Gtk2' symbol in blib/arch/auto/Gtk2/Gtk2.so
[00:00:11]  at tools/podifyenums.pl line 0.

This used to work at Q3 2023.
